commands.review_summary:
The branch removes recency and current-agent filters from Control UI chat picker/session refresh requests while retaining configured-agent scope, the 100-row refresh cap, and slash-command agent scoping.

Reproducibility: yes. via source inspection: current main sends `sessions.list` with recency and agent filters from the chat picker refresh paths, and the gateway filters rows by those fields before returning them. I did not run live UI proof in this read-only review.
